fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. list_workspaces returns discovered descendant stores (e.g. memory-api, memory-viewers, viewer-api, context-stack) as selectable, labelled workspaces. 2. Enumeration reuses the same policy-aware discovery already used for aggregated indexing. 3. Viewers can present a domain/workspace selector from this list. 4. Discovery-vs-enumeration behaviour is documented so a store present in the aggregated index is not misreported as absent.
fields.title: [ticket-mcp][memory-api] Enumerate discovered descendant stores in list_workspaces for viewer domain selection
